programme.title: The King of Queens: Class Struggle

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti

programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find their sense of charity. Barry unearths a bag that has him hitting the slopes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hillstrand's Last Catch
programme.desc: Two old friends race to finish their seasons, one with hopes of capping off a storied career. Johnathan Hillstrand wants to say goodbye in a blaze of glory but the Bering Sea may have different plans.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard desperately scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet anxiously waits to discover the fate of its six-man crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig contemplates an early exit.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Last Damn Arctic Storm
programme.desc: Award-winning filmmaker Simcha Jacobovici and Hollywood legend James Cameron seek to solve the mystery of Atlantis. Where was the port city Plato wrote about located? Who were the real Atlanteans? What disaster wiped them from the face of the Earth?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Sig and Jake have a massive falling out, leading to new strategies and new alliances. Josh Harris returns to captain his father's boat. Sean plays dirty, but Wild Bill shows him he's messing with the wrong Captain. With big rewards, come big risks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: First Blood
programme.desc: Bering Sea draws first blood in a daring Coast Guard rescue. Jake strives to become an independent Captain, and Keith offers to take him on as an apprentice, but accusations fly and suspicions grow as the captains plunge head first into a brutal start.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab he might betray it. Wild Bill takes a big risk on a new idea hoping it will make up for a bumpy start. A dangerous mistake jeopardizes Jake's offload.The Cornelia Marie gets tipped by bad weather.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Sig and Jake have a massive falling out, leading to new strategies and new alliances. Josh Harris returns to captain his father's boat. Sean plays dirty, but Wild Bill shows him he's messing with the wrong Captain. With big rewards, come big risks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Man Down
programme.desc: When Mother Nature stirs it up on the Bering Sea, Sean is set on a collision course with another boat, two deckhands get taken down on the Wizard, and Jake almost loses a deckhand, twice.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hillstrand's Last Catch
programme.desc: Two old friends race to finish their seasons, one with hopes of capping off a storied career. Johnathan Hillstrand wants to say goodbye in a blaze of glory but the Bering Sea may have different plans.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard desperately scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet anxiously waits to discover the fate of its six-man crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig contemplates an early exit.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Last Damn Arctic Storm
programme.desc: Award-winning filmmaker Simcha Jacobovici and Hollywood legend James Cameron seek to solve the mystery of Atlantis. Where was the port city Plato wrote about located? Who were the real Atlanteans? What disaster wiped them from the face of the Earth?

programme.title: Whale Wars: Fight to the Death
programme.desc: Rookie leader Peter Hamarstedt struggles as crew members fail to obey his orders with a brutal storm on the way. The campaign could be in jeopardy as Japanese harpoon ships are looming.

programme.title: Whale Wars: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: When the Bob Barker collides with a Japanese harpoon ship, Sea Shepherd is left to track the whaling fleet by helicopter. Hope begins to fade when blizzard conditions block communication and freezes the instruments.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the disappearance of fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. Evidence points to the arrival of a new top predator, but it could be something far more insidious spreading into Western Australia.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Ice Age Predator
programme.desc: Tales of monstrous, man-sized pike have persisted in Europe for generations. Now, Jeremy Wade is on a journey to catch this prehistoric monster, starting in the lakes of Ireland and leading to unfished waters on the edge of the Arctic Circle in Sweden.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a beast in a remote outback river. As his investigation unfolds, Jeremy is faced with the exciting possibility that a giant predator he once thought extinct could be back.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Underwater Worlds
programme.desc: Ancient underwater cities can be found around the globe. Take a look at these cities and examine whether they are remnants of mysterious past civilizations, or even proof of extraterrestrial visitations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Angkor Wat, Cambodia, is the world's largest ancient religious temple. Within its megalithic ruins, researchers have discovered a depiction of a species of dinosaur: a stegosaurus.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Power Plants
programme.desc: Egyptian hieroglyphs depict the use of light bulbs; Mesopotamian batteries are found.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Satan Conspiracy
programme.desc: New interpretations of ancient texts indicate that Satan may have been an extraterrestrial who was more of an ally to humanity than an enemy by passing along knowledge that planted the seed for civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Insects
programme.desc: Earth is home to 10 quintillion insects. In cultures throughout the world, insects have been honoured, feared and even revered as gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Today, we discuss ancient myths across a wide variety of cultures in which the gods are portrayed as intervening in human affairs. It is possible that these supernatural events may not be the work of gods, but rather proof of extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: City of the Gods
programme.desc: The ancient site of Teotihuacan in central Mexico is one of the world's greatest mysteries. Modern excavations at the site have unearthed discoveries of substances out of place in the ancient world.

programme.desc: Captain Drummond's girlfriend is kidnapped by an enemy of his who seeks revenge.

programme.desc: A former opera star, who is now a lonely old woman, recounts her life story to her young neighbour.

programme.title: Movie: Dinner at Eight
programme.desc: A high-society dinner party masks a hotbed of scandal and intrigue.

programme.title: Movie: Arsene Lupin
programme.desc: A detective vows to bring a clever gentleman burglar to justice.

programme.title: Movie: Svengali
programme.desc: A young girl becomes a singing artist because of a hypnotist's spell.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Man Votes
programme.desc: A widowed man nearly loses his children, until a politician discovers he needs his vote.

programme.title: Movie: The Honeymoon Machine
programme.desc: Sailors on a Navy ship try to use the boat's computer to win at roulette. Unfortunately, an Admiral intercepts the computer's output and assumes the fleet is about to be attacked.

programme.title: Movie: Soldier in the Rain
programme.desc: The friendship between an older, worldly sergeant and a younger, naive soldier is explored.

programme.desc: An ex-con and his wife go on the lam after their plans to rob a bank go very wrong.

programme.title: Movie: Bullitt

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies
programme.desc: A group of teenage zombies enroll in Seabrook High School and work together to show Seabrook what they can achieve when they embrace their differences and celebrate what makes them a community.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies 2

programme.title: Bunk'd: We Can't Bear It!

programme.title: Bunk'd: Let's Bounce!

programme.title: Bunk'd: Take the Cake

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Trouble With Levi
programme.desc: When Levi is moved up to Booker’s science class, Levi inadvertently cramps his style with his classmates.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Jessie: Throw Momma from the Terrace
programme.desc: Jessie invites Bertram's mom to visit as a surprise for his birthday. However, unbeknownst to Jessie, Bertram and his mom do not get along. Meanwhile, Ravi and Luke compete in a school egg-drop competition.

programme.title: Jessie: We Don't Need No Stinkin' Badges
programme.desc: Jessie offers to help Zuri earn Butterfly Scout troop badges during a Central Park camping trip. Meanwhile, Luke convinces Ravi that lying is a super power.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Crewed Up
programme.desc: When Levi starts hanging out with a new group of friends, Booker has a vision that leads him to believe that they're up to no good and tries to steer Levi away from them.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Champ-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie is getting ready to leave for Australia when he realizes he wants to get back together with Maddie. He isn't sure she feels the same. Diggie tries to talk with her, but she's swamped with the team winning the state championship.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Continued-A-Rooney
programme.desc: While Joey and Maddie try to catch Diggie before he departs for Australia, Liv covers for Maddie at home. But when Diggie shows up at the Rooney house, chaos ensues, reminding Parker of his favourite soap opera drama.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Parents & Punishments

programme.desc: A vacationing couple's disappearance exposes the horrific crimes of a murderous husband and wife.

programme.desc: Features couples whose passion drives them to commit terrible criminal acts.

programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered in a town park, the investigation into what happened exposes a sordid tale of lust, torture, and two cases of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Tia Skinner & Jonathan Kurtz
programme.desc: Features couples whose passion drives them to commit terrible criminal acts.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killer Surgeon
programme.desc: An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Trap
programme.desc: It was an affluent neighborhood with tree lined streets. Violent crime was unheard of here until that morning when, under the very noses of the cops, a terrible murder occurred. Investigators found a riddle, a deception, a piece of pure evil.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: When Todd Winkler was arrested for killing his wife Rachel, he claimed self-defense. Investigators learned Rachel wasn't the first Mrs. Winkler to die and traveled cross country to understand what happened on that camping trip a decade earlier.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated military man who survived war zones is caught in the crossfire of a lover's triangle.

programme.title: Dateline: The House on Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: A wife and mother of three disappears without a trace. Could her home’s security cameras hold the key to solving the mystery? Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted Tale
programme.desc: When Denise Huskins reappeared just two days after her boyfriend reported she was abducted, police accused the couple of perpetrating a hoax. But another, similar crime caused authorities to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Poison
programme.desc: Larry McNabney had a thriving career and a wife he adored. Then he vanished. It was a mystery as twisted as they come. At its center: three lives tangled together in a love triangle, including one of them who was hiding a secret identity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Abie

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freeway Fireball
programme.desc: Scientists race to determine what might have caused a mysterious explosion when two ordinary trucks collide in rush hour traffic resulting in a devastating blast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freeway Fireball
programme.desc: Scientists race to determine what might have caused a mysterious explosion when two ordinary trucks collide in rush hour traffic resulting in a devastating blast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Beast of Fear Island
programme.desc: A giant bear terrorizes the Alaskan wilderness and a team of experts use state-of-the-art technology to track down this mysterious beast.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Teacher
programme.desc: When a beloved high school teacher no-call, no-shows to an important event, her small western Michigan community is put on red alert.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Murder in Cordova
programme.desc: When the body of 43-year-old Tina Coronna is discovered in the backseat of her abandoned truck, detectives must piece together clues gleaned from the victim's emotional husband, his mistress, and a neighborhood vigilante.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Teacher
programme.desc: When a beloved high school teacher no-call, no-shows to an important event, her small western Michigan community is put on red alert.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Murder in Cordova
programme.desc: When the body of 43-year-old Tina Coronna is discovered in the backseat of her abandoned truck, detectives must piece together clues gleaned from the victim's emotional husband, his mistress, and a neighborhood vigilante.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: After a beloved Florida physician was found dead in his mansion, police wade through his secret, dark past for clues.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Doctor Will See You Now
programme.desc: Examines the dark side of love with a peek into lust and obsession.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Swing and a Missus
programme.desc: Merchant marine Lee Sehorne's long stints at sea leave his young wife, Cristie, lonely. Cristie floats the idea of going to a swinger's club while Lee's away and he agrees to it. But her torrid affair with the club bouncer leads to tragedy for all.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Friends to the End
programme.desc: A close-knit group of co-workers are devastated when one of their own is found dead near a soccer field at the edge of their quiet Indiana town.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Killer Coverup
programme.desc: A beloved friend and co-worker goes missing on a desolate mountain, and detectives must sort through a list of tightknit colleagues with potential motives for murder. One of them has crucial information that will lead to a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Forever and a Day
programme.desc: When a former police officer is dumped she takes the law into her own hands; a quiet housewife buries her marriage problems in the garden; and an excited fiancée turns into the worst kind of bridezilla.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: Find out what made these women so angry that they turned on the ones they loved.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Souls of Stone
programme.desc: Selfish women will sometimes sell their souls to the devil to get what they want. A scorned lover weaves a web of lies, a teenage Goth orders a reign of terror, and a gold-digger buries secrets in her basement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Above the Law
programme.desc: For some, high social status is a license to kill. Trusted by the community, these ladies are beyond suspicion as the bodies pile up. No matter how heinous their crimes, these women get away with murder so easily; they assume they're entitled to do it.

programme.title: 20/20: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: When Vallejo, California resident Aaron Quinn reported that kidnappers broke into his home, abducted his girlfriend Denise Huskins, and demanded a ransom, their story garnered national attention.
A combination of interviews, feature stories and hard-hitting investigative reports are presented by seasoned reporters.

programme.title: 20/20: Tragedy on TV
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the events surrounding the murder of Alison Parker and Adam Ward who were shot on live TV. 20/20 shares all new details from the 23-page suicide note Bryce Williams sent as well as a look inside the mind of the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Water, Water Everywhere
programme.desc: An active family in Austin, Texas, wants their own pool so they can spend time together outdoors at home and entertain their friends. Steve and Justin design a beautiful, feature-packed pool with copper scuppers and floating steps.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Heights Cottage
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis turns her attention to a rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting in the living room, she rips out an old staircase leading to the kitchen before making her way outside to create a new boardwalk entry, picket fence and back deck.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Case Avenue House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis heads to St. Paul for the first time to work on a home in an up-and-coming neighborhood.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Nicole's Grandparents' House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on her most personal project ever: a 1950s ranch-style home her grandparents built by hand. She restores the kitchen to its original layout and transforms the dingy work basement into a party-ready rec room.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!

programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Seven years after being convicted of first-degree murder, new disturbing information comes to light about Jodi Arias and the murder of her ex-boyfriend. Tracy Brown and Donavan Bering reveal details and shocking new information.

programme.title: Movie: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Based on the disturbing murder trial that has captivated the nation, this film tells the story of Jodi Arias, a seductive 28-year-old found guilty of killing her former lover.

programme.title: Movie: The Sinister Surrogate
programme.desc: A couple finds the perfect surrogate to bear their child but when the birth of a beautiful baby girl happens, the couple learns how deep and dark a mother's love can go.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho In-Law
programme.desc: Tina can't wait to marry Brock and everyone feels the same way, everyone but Joyce, Brock's former mother-in-law. Joyce does all she can to tear the happy couple apart, proving that she'll do whatever is necessary to stop them from getting married.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: World's Worst Fugitive (Part 1)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been linked to the deaths of his wife, his best friend, and his neighbor.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Great whites have returned to the waters off South Australia due to lack of human activity. Now, shark experts can study them up close and personal in ways that were previously impossible.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Can't Stop Itching
programme.desc: A man's itchy rash turns out to be more than just poison oak; a young woman is bleeding profusely from the inside of her lip.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hooked
programme.desc: A fishing lure embedded in a man's face turns out to be the least of his problems. A pair of unconscious teenagers are brought to the ER where dramatic family secrets are revealed. An ER Tech collapses and then refuses traditional medical treatment.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Doctor's Dilemma
programme.desc: A young pregnant woman in labour begs the ER doctor to keep her pregnancy and delivery a secret from her father. Twins share similar, confusing symptoms. A man with no pulse or blood pressure is still alive and breathing, mystifying his doctors.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hockey Player Down
programme.desc: A young girl is mysteriously paralyzed from the waist down; a young man complains of a splitting headache, but his motives seem suspicious; a bride-to-be has appendicitis on her wedding day.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Never Say Die
programme.desc: A doctor struggles with the decision to revive an older patient after prolonged CPR. Two nurses encounter a stabbing victim on the street and try to save him. A doctor on a cruise ship finds that her dream job has become a nightmare.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: My Head's Exploding
programme.desc: A patient with a severe headache is seizing, then bruises erupt on her legs and her doctor has no idea why; a naked woman is behaving so oddly that her doctor thinks she's on drugs; and a wrestler has been vomiting for days, and the cause is a shock.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Hate Doctors
programme.desc: A hospital worker feels like she's dying but doctors can find nothing wrong; a physician's young son is a patient in her own ER; a woman's hobby of mushroom picking sends her to the ER.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: American Greed: Deadly Rich: Rocky Mountain Die

programme.desc: When Christy catches the eye of Candace's wealthy, charming father, Fred, Candace and Baxter are outraged, while Bonnie pushes Christy to give him a chance.

programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey and her beehive go missing from her farm. Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared along with its cargo: Chickaletta.

programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert.

programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy's Playlist

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail

programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Dr. Evil teams up with a unique villain named Goldmember to take over the world by going back in time to kidnap Austin Powers' father.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: British Invasion
programme.desc: The guys cross the pond for the first-ever international episode of Impractical Jokers. Joe, Murr, Q and Sal may be up to their old tricks, but the clueless people on the receiving end of the those tricks won't be the typical 'marks' they're used to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty
programme.desc: Tone Bell schools a lucky person on the street, Jade Catta-Preta goes hard at Tone's love life, and Noah Gardenswartz spots someone very special in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Twists
programme.desc: Guy visits unique comfort food places, such as the dog-friendly neighbourhood joint that serves the Barking Lard BLT.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup, Salad and Seafood
programme.desc: Guy's dives into classic comfort foods in Kansas City and in Franklin, Tennessee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Outside the Box
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Dallas to turn tex-mex into mex-tex with savoury soups. He travels to Baltimore and meets Duff Goldman who stops by to seek out the secrets of the square pizza, and in Santa Barbara, a restaurant is turning turkey into fritters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Fieri Family Watch Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and family cozy up to take a look back at the first pilot episode. This cross-country drive down memory lane includes a nine-seat counter in New Jersey and a 1950s-style diner in Boston cranking out their own corned beef hash.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Open 24/7
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes 'round the clock at some places with great food at any hour of the day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Fieri Family Watch Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and family cozy up to take a look back at the first pilot episode. This cross-country drive down memory lane includes a nine-seat counter in New Jersey and a 1950s-style diner in Boston cranking out their own corned beef hash.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mama's Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits a dive in Oklahoma serving wings and waffles and a Polish joint in L.A.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub and More

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fun Family Favorites

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters: Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the roots of fishing in Africa's Rift Valley and the monsters the first fishermen faced. It's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: River of Blood
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to remote wetlands to investigate reports of a brutal riverside mutilation where he comes face to face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighters and uncovers the slasher stalking Argentina's River of Blood.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Legend of the Freshwater Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to capture the legendary Lua-Lua, an Amazonian aquatic beast that claimed the lives of many men. Meanwhile, Water Mama, a flesh-eating killer, still lurks in freshwaters and Wade is desperate for an up-close encounter.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: The Mekong River is well known for its monstrous fish. This time, Jeremy is drawn to the spot in Southeast Asia after reports of something that has sliced cleanly through a young man's testicle.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Freshwater Flesh-Eater
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to find the aquatic man-eater responsible for the RMS Laconia attack that left nearly a thousand passengers dead in the water. Later, he finds himself tackling bull sharks that have suddenly wreaked havoc in Africa's freshwaters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Piranha
programme.desc: Piranha viciously mutilated a coach full of passengers when it crashed into the Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Ray
programme.desc: The Giant Freshwater Stingray in Thailand is armed with a venomous 10-inch barbed tail.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Puppy's Journey Home
programme.desc: Villalobos is stretched thin when rescue calls come in one after another. A couple from rural Idaho visits the rescue, ready to open their hearts to a new friend. Mariah and parolee Leigh help a neighbor whose dog has become too much to handle.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs Who Made Us

programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Desert Codes
programme.desc: Giant ancient drawings found etched into the desert floor could be part of an ancient alien code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Element 115
programme.desc: An exotic heavy element may provide the key to humanity's future in the stars. According to physicist Bob Lazar, 'element 115' is the fuel source for an alien spacecraft he was hired to reverse-engineer by the U.S. government.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Constellation Code
programme.desc: Throughout the ancient world, structures were built to mirror the constellations in the night sky--and, in most cases, this is only apparent when they are viewed from high above the Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Stargates
programme.desc: Legends from around the world speak of sacred entryways to the land of the gods -- gates that allowed instant passage not just beyond the confines of Earth, but beyond space and time. Such legends are investigated in Turkey and Mexico.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Decoding the Cosmic Egg
programme.desc: A cosmic egg, in which the universe or some primordial being comes into existence by the hatching of an egg, is found in the creation myths of many cultures. Clues to the origin of the cosmic egg may lie in another symbol which resembles our DNA code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Earth Station Egypt
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos explores the latest scientific discoveries at some of the world's most ancient places to find evidence that extraterrestrials visited Egypt in the distant past.
