programme.title: Mountain Men: Strike it Rich
programme.desc: Josh goes panning for gold in a quest to unearth the West's greatest treasure. Eustache fights to save his land. Jason returns to the forge, putting his injured hand to the test. Jake battles steep terrain. Kidd and Harry risk getting crushed.

programme.title: Alone: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: One survivalist rushes to prevent their shot at a million dollars from going up in smoke, while another struggles to complete a shelter in time for winter.

programme.title: Alone: The Wolves
programme.desc: Icy rocks and water force the participants to decide whether dangerous risks are worth it. One participant prepares to fight for his life.

programme.title: Alone: Pins and Needles
programme.desc: As the participants march deeper into winter, it becomes increasingly difficult to procure food. One participant gets a lucky break, but soon discovers things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: World War II in HD: Edge of the Abyss
programme.desc: The Battle of the Bulge pushes the Allies to the brink; Okinawa erupts.

programme.title: World War II in HD: End Game
programme.desc: With the end in sight, Okinawa is a bloody obstacle to victory.

programme.title: World War II in HD: The Air Wars
programme.desc: Travel with five veterans on some of the most dangerous, deadly and visually stunning aerial missions of the war.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Amazing Animal Abilities
programme.desc: The strange and inexplicable powers animals have are discussed.

programme.title: Movie: Bullitt
programme.desc: When a mob informant in police protection is fatally wounded in an ambush, tough-cop Frank Bullitt senses corruption and decides to investigate on his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Cincinnati Kid
programme.desc: Card sharps try to deal with personal problems during a big game in New Orleans.

programme.title: Movie: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: A bored tycoon turns to bank robbery and courts the investigator assigned to bring him in.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Escape
programme.desc: This sweeping, exciting Second World War picture follows a gang of crafty Allied POWs as they pool their brainpower and resources to break out of a notoriously inescapable Nazi prison camp.

programme.title: Movie: Papillon
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Henri "Papillon" Charriere, this adventure film follows Papillon, who was given a life sentence for a crime he claims he didn't commit, as he attempts to escape from the notorious Devil's Island penal colony in South America.

programme.title: Movie: Never So Few
programme.desc: Captain Tom Reynolds is supposed to be battling the Japanese in Burma during World War II, but he gets sidetracked when his unit and his Kachin allies are attacked by Chiang Kai-shek's forces.

programme.title: Movie: Fast Company
programme.desc: The heiress to a racing stable uncovers underhanded dealings surrounding a racehorse.

programme.title: Movie: Escape in the Fog
programme.desc: When a nurse has premonitions about a murder, she searches for the intended victim to try to save him.

programme.title: Movie: Sombrero
programme.desc: Three sets of lovers are caught between feuding Mexican villages.

programme.title: Movie: Cry of the Werewolf
programme.desc: The daughter of a werewolf is raised by gypsies and attacks those who know her secret.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Past
programme.desc: An escaped murderer takes a psychoanalyst and his family hostage.

programme.title: Movie: Scaramouche
programme.desc: To avenge his friend's murder, a French rebel masquerades as a clown.

programme.title: Movie: Cash McCall
programme.desc: A business tycoon adopts new set of values to date a company owner's daughter.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned
programme.desc: Emma is upset when her friends stand her up for the new girl in school. Meanwhile, Luke has Ravi help him with his project about India for their school's multicultural night.

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Jessie: All the Knight Moves
programme.desc: When Jessie discovers that Zuri is a chess prodigy, she urges her to compete in a renowned competition. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma suspect that Bertram was once a jewel thief.

programme.title: Jessie: The Jessie-nator: Grudgement Day
programme.desc: Future Jessie appears from an elevator time machine to warn present Jessie to run for her life. She tells Jessie that when Ravi grows up, he invents a robot version of Bertram which tries to destroy Jessie and take over the world.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Wesley Jr.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Move?

programme.title: Bunk'd: No Bones About It

programme.title: Jessie: Panic Attack Room

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up
programme.desc: Jessie becomes threatened when Tony has to train a beautiful girl named Victoria as a doorman. Things get messy when Jessie's old boyfriend Ted comes to town and she finds herself attracted to him.

programme.title: Jessie: Diary of a Mad Newswoman

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: They were two beautiful families living out their dreams, but gunshots in a parking lot revealed an ugly truth. Investigators uncovered three lives tangled in a love triangle. There were many secrets, but which one was the key to solving the mystery?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the wealthy heir to a legendary hotel is murdered, the list of possible suspects is long. He had his share of enemies, and a complicated family. Investigators soon learned someone close to the victim was also in danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Figure in the Garage
programme.desc: He was a single dad, a former firefighter dedicated to helping others. When he was found dead in his garage, police needed help. A neighbor's security camera footage revealed a hooded figure, but who was it? Someone was hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: If Something Happens to Me
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously. Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A defensive husband fleeing justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy. Stephanie Bauer brings new insight to the decade-old case of the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Piketon Family Murders
programme.desc: In rural Piketon, Ohio a family of 8 is murdered execution style across four different properties. As police investigate the attack, word of the brutal murders sends shockwaves through the community and destroys the lives of two families.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Beth Harshbarger
programme.desc: Wife shoots her husband during family hunting trip; questioned whether accident.

programme.title: Snapped: Mia Gonzales
programme.desc: A quiet California cul-de-sac becomes a crime scene when a couple’s domestic drama reaches a deadly climax.

programme.title: Snapped: Tonya Ford
programme.desc: A popular police officer is killed, and the motive may be payback — by a woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Michelle Michaud & James Daveggio
programme.desc: A couple’s dark sexual cravings lead to a series of assaults that only become more gruesome as things heat up.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Sara Aldrete & Adolfo Constanzo
programme.desc: In the Mexican desert, two cult leaders’ passion for torture and human sacrifice is exposed when they pick the wrong victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Carol Bundy and Douglas Clark
programme.desc: A one-night stand turns into a romance from hell after a woman learns of her lover's dark and deadly desires.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Charlene and Gerald Gallego
programme.desc: When a sexually charged love affair spins out of control, two lovers go to extreme lengths to satisfy their desires and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killer Surgeon
programme.desc: An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: Snapped: Deidra Griffin
programme.desc: When the decaying body of a Baltimore man is discovered in his garage, detectives use advanced law enforcement technology to pinpoint a cunning killer.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers' car is abandoned in Bardstown, KY, the mother of 5 vanished. A year later her father is shot dead while searching for her. We discover there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: The Search Continues
programme.desc: The brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown Police Officer is grilled by the FBI. Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent. On the Bluegrass Parkway the scene of a deadly ambush is explored.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer. Family members of Bardstown's other victims speak. A mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: A Murder Most Foul
programme.desc: As the 1st anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaches, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward. An unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen and intriguing direction.

programme.title: Movie: 300
programme.desc: When a massive army sweeps into his land, Sparta's King Leonidas assembles a small but dedicated army to go to battle against the Persians.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge's Son Poisoning
programme.desc: Observing that Marge is lonely, Bart offers to spend time with her. After they go on tandem bike rides and decorate Bart's treehouse, the bullies from school dub Bart a mama's boy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: See Homer Run
programme.desc: Homer's inability to embrace Lisa's Father's Day book the same way he does Bart's Father's Day Toolman causes Lisa to develop DDD (Disappointed Daughter Disorder). In the meantime, Bart causes a huge car pile-up when he steals a street sign.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Italian Bob
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns crashes his Stutz Bearcat, he sends Homer and the family off to Italy to pick up his new fancy sports car. While on their adventure, the Simpsons end up stranded in a village where a rehabilitated Sideshow Bob reigns as mayor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Paternity Coot
programme.desc: Marge's rage against the new toll road system somehow leads to the discovery of a frozen mailman and his 40-year-old mail. The letters are returned to the rightful recipients.

programme.title: The Simpsons: We're on the Road to D'Ohwhere
programme.desc: After Bart steals a key from Principal Skinner's office and gets himself into hot water, Marge and Homer send him to a behaviour modification camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fair Laddy
programme.desc: The Simpsons take in Groundskeeper Willy after Bart accidentally destroys his house. But soon after his arrival, Willy's poor manners become the focus of a bet between Bart and Lisa, as she takes on the challenge of turning him into a proper gentleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story
programme.desc: While cave exploring with his family, Homer causes the cave to crumble and finds himself stuck upside down in the ceiling. Marge and Bart search for help, while Lisa passes the time by telling Homer a story, which turns into a chain of narrated tales.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: When Ned Flanders wins a new computer, he offers it to Marge because he has no use for it. In return, Marge babysits the Flanders children so that Ned can attend the Left-Handed Convention, where he meets Randy Johnson of the New York Yankees.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with Lenny's new plasma TV prompts Marge to enter the family in a sweepstakes, and they win a trip to the Fox Studio Lot. Against Marge's wishes, Homer signs them up for a Trading Spouses-type show.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Bed, Bob and Beyond
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it’s up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Family Guy: You Can't Handle the Booth
programme.desc: In a special episode, the Griffins provide DVD commentary on a recent episode and reveal never-before-told drama between Peter and Lois.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie
programme.desc: To Stewie's surprise, he quickly befriends a boy his age, but is devastated when he realizes he isn't invited to his birthday party. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois attend a self-empowerment seminar.

programme.title: Archer: Training Day
programme.desc: Lana's residual lust for Archer prompts Malory to promote Cyril to field agent. Archer then trains his new competition as only he can, whilst Malory frets over her own past and her son's future.

programme.title: Archer: Diversity Hire
programme.desc: A new field agent makes a splash at ISIS, but Archer and Lana suspect there may be something all too perfect about their new diversity hire.

programme.title: Movie: Warcraft

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: When all out war breaks out between human and ape civilizations, the ape leader struggles to deal with his darkest instincts. With a brutal Colonel leading the human forces, fate draws them together to a fight that will determine the future of the world.

programme.title: Movie: 300
programme.desc: When a massive army sweeps into his land, Sparta's King Leonidas assembles a small but dedicated army to go to battle against the Persians.

programme.title: Movie: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: An account of the second Persian invasion of Greece in 480-479 BC. A Greek general attempts to unite all of Greece by leading an attack against the invading Persian army led by an immortal and the vengeful commander of the Persian army.

programme.title: Movie: Evolution
programme.desc: After a meteor carrying aliens crashes on Earth, a team of misfits sets out to stop them.

programme.title: Movie: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: A wacky police officer attempts to stop the assassination of the British Queen in the U.S.

programme.title: Movie: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The world is astounded when a reclusive candy manufacturer randomly places golden tickets inside chocolate bar wrappers, which will allow five lucky people to tour his unusual factory.

programme.title: Movie: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket lives in a tiny house with his parents and grandparents, and would like nothing more than to win a tour of Willy Wonka's chocolate factory. The adventure begins when he miraculously finds the last golden ticket in a chocolate bar.

programme.title: Movie: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The world is astounded when a reclusive candy manufacturer randomly places golden tickets inside chocolate bar wrappers, which will allow five lucky people to tour his unusual factory.

programme.title: Mission Galapagos: Secrets of the Deep
Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Birds

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captain Freddy
programme.desc: On August 15th 2015, police are alerted to the body of Fernando Silva on a boat. With the crime scene revealing little about what caused his death, police turn to surveillance footage for clues.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: NCIS agents face a tough investigation into one of their own after a young mother, the girlfriend of a navy petty officer, vanishes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Trail of Fire
programme.desc: When a military nurse fails to show up for work, worried friends rush to her apartment only to find her home burned and their friend missing.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: '48 Hours' takes viewers back to October 17, 2010 when Danroy 'DJ' Henry, a university football player, was shot dead by police officer Aaron Hess. That event triggered a seven-year journey for DJ’s family as they searched for answers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In the Name of Hate
programme.desc: The parents of Blaze Bernstein, a brilliant Ivy League student allegedly murdered because he was gay and Jewish, talk with '48 Hours' about the loss of their son and the neo-Nazi hate group that may have fueled anger in his killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Trail of Fire
programme.desc: When a military nurse fails to show up for work, worried friends rush to her apartment only to find her home burned and their friend missing.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Private Needham's War
programme.desc: A young soldier suffering from PTSD is accused of killing his girlfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Target Justice
programme.desc: Investigating the attacks on a Texas prosecutor and district attorney who were both shot dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: NCIS agents face a tough investigation into one of their own after a young mother, the girlfriend of a navy petty officer, vanishes.

programme.title: The Body in the Basement
programme.desc: While tackling the case of a missing woman, police discover a mountain of secrets and lies that leads to a grim discovery in a basement.

programme.title: A Calculated Murder
programme.desc: One year after becoming a mother for the first time, Sara Williamson Raras is found murdered. Police are quick to point the finger at her estranged husband, but an unlikely suspect emerges after a jailhouse informant reveals new information.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder in New England
programme.desc: After grandmother Irene Kennedy is found dead in a park, her family is split apart when a distant relative is charged with her murder. It will take years, another killing and a jail house snitch to bring the family back together.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: True Conviction: Drive to Kill
programme.desc: Cindy Albrecht, the head chef for one of the racing world's top teams, goes missing from her home near the INDY 500 and as the suspects start piling up it becomes a race against time.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Damsel in Distress
programme.desc: A mysterious caller directs police to an eerily quiet suburban block, where they find the lifeless body of McDaniel Smith. The circumstances are hazy, until Demery learns of a caustic legal dispute and a wannabe hero with a history of violence.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Empire of Blood
programme.desc: The discovery of a mutilated corpse prompts a sweeping investigation into a trio of murders, an unreliable informant, and the most deadly cartel in Shreveport. But to close the case, Demery must face off with the man pulling all the strings.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: A mother of three is shot point-blank with a high-caliber rifle just steps from her front door. To catch a two-faced killer with a history of violence, Demery must first win the trust of a family wary of the system.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Side Business
programme.desc: When the body of a professor and family man is discovered in the office of a used car dealership, Detective Postiglione solves the puzzle after recalling a specific clue that gave the killer he spots, the window of opportunity.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Mexico With My Kids
programme.desc: In 2009, Valerie Castellano robbed a bank in rural Indiana and fled with her children and girlfriend to Mexico.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Buddy
programme.desc: Larry McClendon, while in prison for murder, escapes with seven others. Larry is forced to be creative in his evasion of the cops; hiding in abandoned shacks, and muddy pigpens, and even dressing as a woman as a disguise.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Mexico With My Kids
programme.desc: In 2009, Valerie Castellano robbed a bank in rural Indiana and fled with her children and girlfriend to Mexico.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Buddy
programme.desc: Larry McClendon, while in prison for murder, escapes with seven others. Larry is forced to be creative in his evasion of the cops; hiding in abandoned shacks, and muddy pigpens, and even dressing as a woman as a disguise.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Expect lots of twists and turns in the kitchen when four cupcake makers face off to for the chance to be featured at an exclusive cast and crew party celebrating the 10,000th episode of the classic soap, The Young and the Restless.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: Christmas in July
programme.desc: It's a showdown of Christmas cupcakes as four top bakers battle it out making edible snow globes. Judges Nacho Aguirre, Amirah Kassem and Maureen McCormick determine which cupcake designer goes home after the first round.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Bakin' With Bacon
programme.desc: It's no secret that Valerie Bertinelli loves lemon, but Duff Goldman's favorite ingredient is revealed in this season's kick-off challenge- bacon cupcakes! Each of the 12 young bakers must make a cupcake featuring bacon and an assigned ingredient.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Spots and Stripes Forever
programme.desc: Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli take the 11 young bakers on a safari of sweetness as they challenge them to create mini cheesecakes with colourful animal prints, from tiger and zebra stripes to leopard and giraffe spots.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Brownies vs. Blondies
programme.desc: Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli divide the 10 young bakers into teams for the brownies vs. blondies challenge.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Macaron Madness
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the nine young bakers to create macarons decorated with happy faces and sad faces.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Opposites Attract
programme.desc: Bakers must get into pairs; each baker makes half a cake that combines with their teammate's half-cake to make a whole cake representing an opposites theme like fire and ice.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: These restaurants have quickly become famous food destinations and local legends. Ogunquit, Maine, Cleveland Ohio, Baltimore Maryland, and San Francisco. Unique and pioneering dishes that turn first time costumers into long-time fans.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Dirt Cheap and Delicious
programme.desc: You don't need to sacrifice taste to eat cheap at these joints. Pulled pork PBLT and squash dumplings and outdoor food market with BBQ and biscuits.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Food by Fire
programme.desc: This takes food back to its roots - cooked by open flames but in new and inspiring ways.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Portland Weekend
programme.desc: A breakfast of baked eggs and tomato stew; your favourite comfort foods turned into dumplings.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Pasta
programme.desc: Visit restaurants that are turning out pasta dishes like nothing you've tasted before. Cacao tajarin in San Francisco; plum gnocchii in Boulder; and unique pastas in New York and Seattle.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Philadelphia Weekend
programme.desc: Spend a weekend in the Brotherly Love and discover some truly unique eats.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Roger is grilling steaks and chickens in California, and smoking a bounty of seafood in Illinois. High heat for meat and low smoke for seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Puerto Rican Grilling
programme.desc: Roger is in Puerto Rico where the weather is hot, the view is smoking and the food is a fuego. It's his first time visiting Puerto Rico and he's inviting his friends along for the ride.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Good Eats: Apple Family Values
programme.desc: Alton Brown shows you how to shop, store and prepare some apple classics such as: ten-minute applesauce and a waldorf salad.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Alton Brown believes the crust is the best attribute of the pie, and battles to prove it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Citizen Cane
programme.desc: Alton Brown explains how easy and delicious sugar recipes can be. Featured recipes: burned peach ice cream and banana splitsville.

programme.title: Good Eats: Urban Preservation: Jam Session
programme.desc: Alton wonders why nobody seems to make jam anymore and hopes to revive the time-honoured tradition of canning through his easy methods.

programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spring Break-Up/ Dimmsdale Daze
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe wish their families could go camping together, which starts a feud between their parents. Chloe wishes that she could be a parent so that she can go to the Dimmsdale Daze carnival with Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk vs. Machine/ Shack Magic
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete in a dodgeball tournament but no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon.The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games and wonder if it's magic or something more sinister.

programme.title: Movie: Rufus
programme.desc: After Manny makes a wish on a magic amulet, his dog Rufus turns into a real boy, and the two rule the school.

programme.title: Movie: Rufus 2
programme.desc: Rufus gets a crush on a new girl at school with a secret, but Manny and Paige become suspicious of her. A mysterious villain seeks out the magic amulet.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Inspongeiac
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't sleep so he enlists the help of Patrick to finally get some rest, however Patrick can't seem to stay awake.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Return to New York
programme.desc: The turtles return to the city to search for Splinter, only to find that the city is overrun with Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Serpent Hunt
programme.desc: As the turtles seach for Karai, they have to deal with a city filled with Kraangdroids as well as Zeck and Steranko, who hunt Karai for their own means.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pig and the Rhino
programme.desc: Donnie finishes a new batch of retro-mutagen, hoping to save Karai, but the Turtles find themselves hunted by Shredder's new vengeful henchmen Bebop and Rocksteady.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Battle for New York
programme.desc: The Turtles brave the bizarre world of Dimension X to try and save the people of New York.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: The Quacken/ The Treasure of Nosepatch
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: For Wheeler/ Brickmuda Heptagon
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Big Bro Theodore/ No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon.Alvin tricks Theodore into believing he's great at mini golf which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Granny Awards/ Sick Day
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks he's nominated for a Grammy, but it's actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to the Dagarack Convention.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Saturday Night Lies
programme.desc: When Ray runs into an ex-girlfriend, he tries to impress her by pretending that Henry, Charlotte, and Jasper are his children.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Frittle Problem
programme.desc: When Henry's dad gets an offer for a new job in Bordertown, Henry and Ray go undercover to try and stop Henry's dad from getting the job and prevent Henry from having to move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Toddler Invasion
programme.desc: When The Toddler takes control of the Man Cave, Charlotte and Jasper have to find a way to sneak into the Man Cave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Diamonds Are for Heather
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man are called to the Swellview Museum of Stools and Jewels to protect the rare Neal Diamond from being stolen.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Amazing Rat Race
programme.desc: Max helps Billy become the world's fastest rat so he can win the rat races he has with his bandmates.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Meet the Evilmans
programme.desc: It's Romeo and Juliet super-style when a retired supervillain that happens to be Thunder Man's old nemesis moves to Hiddenville and his son and Phoebe secretly start dating.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Blue Detective
programme.desc: When Max's skin turns blue while on a date, everyone becomes a suspect as he turns super-sleuth in an effort to find out whodunit.

programme.title: The Thundermans: One Hit Thunder
programme.desc: When Max uses personal information about Phoebe and Link in a song for his band, he causes a rift in their relationship. Meanwhile, Hank and Barb try to teach Billy and Nora a valuable lesson.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Fish Talker/ Wet Doom
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger use Schowz' Fish-Talker helmet to help a lost fish find his way home. While stuck in a restaurant bathroom, Ray, Henry, Charlotte, Jasper, and Schwoz reminisce about past adventures.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are attacked by wax figures at the Celebrity Wax Museum. And, Brad posts embarrassing videos of Captain Man and Kid Dangers until they turn him invisible again.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Lord of the Jump Kings
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Sparkle Fight
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Rat-a-Phooey!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Wreck Your Neck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Pigeon Vision
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Fruit Scoot Boogie
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The First Ever Summer Games Showdown
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Genesis!
Yo-Kai Watch: Yo-kai D'wanna/ Yo-kai Insomni/ Komasan in Love
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Sparking Confusion!
programme.desc: Some unusual activity is occurring around Wela Volcano, but the Ultra Guardians are on the case!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: World's Worst Fugitive (Part 1)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been linked to the deaths of his wife, his best friend, and his neighbor.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Snoop Dogg revisits crazy shark encounters, marvels at unpredictable reactions and meets with the pros to unlock the secrets behind mysterious great white behavior.

programme.desc: Locals abandoned Ghost Island after multiple shipwrecks and shark attacks. Now, Dr. Craig O'Connell and his team of experts dive in to find out why the island at the edge of the Bermuda Triangle attracts so many sharks, including the Great White.

programme.desc: Great whites have learned new ways to hunt seals on Cape Cod. Dr. Greg Skomal and his team wonder what the sharks are doing here, how they get here, and how more sharks learn of Cape Cod's bounty of seals.

programme.title: The Killing Games
programme.desc: Dr. Jonathan Werry and shark cinematographer Andy Casagrande travel to a special location in South Australia to research a new great white hunting strategy.

programme.title: Adam Devine's Secret Shark Lair

programme.desc: Experts investigate why a group of great whites of the coast of Western Australia is more aggressive than others.

programme.title: Tiger Shark King
programme.desc: Dr. Austin Gallagher investigates camera footage of a 14-foot tiger shark being attacked by an unseen beast.

programme.title: Mako Nation
programme.desc: Shark expert Riley Elliot and underwater cameraman Andy Casagrande are on an epic expedition to uncover the mysteries of the mako shark in one of the last places on earth where these apex predators rule the waters.

programme.title: Abandoned Waters
programme.desc: Lack of human activity on the water caused by the global lockdown has led the largest great whites in South Australia to return to their natural behaviors. Shark experts can now study them up close and personal in ways that were nearly impossible before.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Great White Serial Killer Extinction
programme.desc: The Great White Serial Killer returns and it's on a killing spree that may push the California Sea Otter to extinction. Investigators deploy an otter dummy to get a closer look and witness one of the most spectacular attacks in Shark Week history.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Ultimate Breach Off
programme.desc: Three teams of researchers return to one of the last hunting grounds for Air Jaws. They will use decoys, drones and underwater cameras to count the number of breaches and collect data on hunting techniques to see if the shark population is rebounding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Showing Off Your Assets

programme.desc: Jesse upsets his father's plan when he decides that he wants out of the family business.

programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Steel learns the concept of discipline and takes it too far, putting one of the Rangers in real danger.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out

programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: It's chaos at Buffalo when the Christmas toy run to the Arctic is plagued by breakdowns and the stress pushes Kelly past her breaking point.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Killer Sea Foam
programme.desc: Killer sea foam, a lake that disappears and reappears, air filled with diamond dust and a snowfall in a Middle Eastern desert are all explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Mist Domes and Square Waves
programme.desc: A weird white dome appears over a valley famous for UFO sightings. Engineers try to work out why a huge bridge collapses on a clear blue day, was the weather secretly to blame?

programme.title: Weird Earth: Fire Worms and Green Clouds
programme.desc: What is the mysterious glowing green entity filmed in Australia's night time sky? Does footage of a twisting fire worm prove locals legends about a cave dwelling super serpent? And why is a bizarre face filmed glaring from the sky in Saudi Arabia?

programme.title: Mayday: Final Approach
programme.desc: On August 6, 1997, Korean Air Flight 801 crashed five kilometres short of its destination. Killing 200 people on board it began the crusade of one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strange Skies
programme.desc: In 24-hour period thunderstorms, multiple suns, rainbows and night mirages change the Earth's sky.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: It Fell From Space
programme.desc: Exposing the secrets behind asteroids, comets and space debris that fall to Earth from space. Investigating the latest technologies that detect space objects before coming to Earth and the spacecraft designed to stop them.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Sinkholes
programme.desc: Sinkholes generate below the surface of the earth and will swallow anything above the surface. In North America, there are hundreds of thousands of sinkholes alone.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Big City Twister: Miami
programme.desc: Explore what might happen if an EF-5 touched down in Miami Beach, Florida. Built to withstand hurricanes, this vacation paradise could be literally torn apart by the force of such a strong twister, which, unlike a hurricane, gives no notice.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Moore
programme.desc: See the story of the Moore Tornado through firsthand accounts and videos.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: I Survived: Split Second
programme.desc: A shelter provides a welcome refuge from the storm until it becomes a trap. A grandmother who runs a daycare takes cover in a bathtub and saves herself and three toddlers. A neighbor feels guilt when he turns his back on a woman caught outside.

programme.title: FireStorm

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Lydia
programme.desc: Stuck in a hoarded house, with no job, no motivation and no direction, Andrew needs to control his hoarding to have a normal life. Lydia's son may be sent to a nursing home if she doesn't clean her house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Glen/ Lisa
programme.desc: Twenty-five-hundred free-roaming rats have hoarded Glen out of his home and into a shed on his property. More than 30 cats roam freely through Lisa's cluttered home and she is threatened with eviction.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ron/ Carol
programme.desc: Ron's home is filled from top to bottom with paper--books, old newspapers and more. Carol has been sleeping in a hoarded truck parked in front of her condemned hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandy and Len
programme.desc: Len lives in a home stuffed full of garbage bags where he keeps all his belongings. If he doesn't clean up, his family fears his house will kill him.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathy and Elmira
programme.desc: Kathy has hoarded out her triplex and a dance studio and is facing financial ruin if she can't clean up and rent out her spaces.

programme.title: Hoarders: Peggy and Ed and Connie
programme.desc: Peggy's hoard of filth and dead animal carcasses has led the city to deem her house uninhabitable. If she does not clean up, city officials will not allow Peggy to return to her beloved home.
